pg133-p1-s2:
We are sure God wants us to be happy,
joyous, and free.
pg133-p1-s3:
We cannot subscribe to the belief that this life is a vale of tears, though it once was just that for
many of us.
pg133-p1-s4: But it is clear that we made our own misery.
pg133-p1-s6:

pg133-p1:
each family play together or separately, as much as their circumstances warrant. We are sure God wants us to be happy,
joyous, and free. We cannot subscribe to the belief that this life is a vale of tears, though it once was just that for
many of us. But it is clear that we made our own misery. God didn't do it. Avoid then, the deliberate manufacture of
misery, but if trouble comes, cheerfully capitalize it as an opportunity to demonstrate His omnipotence.
pg133-p2-s1:
Now about health: A body badly burned by alcohol does not often recover overnight nor do twisted thinking and depression
vanish in a twinkling.
pg133-p2-s2: We are convinced that a spiritual mode of living is a most powerful health restorative.
pg133-p2-s3:
We, who
have recovered from serious drinking, are miracles of mental health.
pg133-p2-s4:
But we have seen remarkable transformations in our
bodies.
pg133-p2-s5: Hardly one of our crowd now shows any mark of dissipation.
pg133-p2:
Now about health: A body badly burned by alcohol does not often recover overnight nor do twisted thinking and depression
vanish in a twinkling. We are convinced that a spiritual mode of living is a most powerful health restorative. We, who
have recovered from serious drinking, are miracles of mental health. But we have seen remarkable transformations in our
bodies. Hardly one of our crowd now shows any mark of dissipation.
pg133-p3-s1: But this does not mean that we disregard human health measures.
pg133-p3-s2:
God has abundantly supplied this world with fine
doctors, psychologists, and practitioners of various kinds.
pg133-p3-s3:
Do not hesitate to take your health problems to such
persons.
pg133-p3-s4: Most of them give freely of themselves, that their fellows may enjoy sound minds and bodies.
pg133-p3-s5:
Try to remember
that though God has wrought miracles among us, we should never belittle a good doctor or psychiatrist.
pg133-p3-s6:
Their services
are often indispensable in treating a newcomer and in following his case afterward.
pg133-p3:
But this does not mean that we disregard human health measures. God has abundantly supplied this world with fine
doctors, psychologists, and practitioners of various kinds. Do not hesitate to take your health problems to such
persons. Most of them give freely of themselves, that their fellows may enjoy sound minds and bodies. Try to remember
that though God has wrought miracles among us, we should never belittle a good doctor or psychiatrist. Their services
are often indispensable in treating a newcomer and in following his case afterward.
pg133-p4-s1:
One of the many doctors who had the opportunity of reading this book in manuscript form told us that the use of sweets
was often helpful, of course depending upon a doctor's advice.
pg133-p4:
